title: Master Order Edit Working Set Persistence

production_case.bug: Changing the left unmerged-child filters during edit could clear the right grouped pane and make submit replace the master order with only newly visible children.

root_cause: The grouped pane was derived from unmergedOrdersCache, which is the candidate-result cache.
loadUnmergedChildOrders replaced unmergedOrdersCache on every candidate reload.
syncVisibleGroupedChildOrderIds mutated selectedGroupedChildOrderIds to only visible rows.
submitMasterOrder used that visible-derived list as the replacement childOrderIds payload.
updateMasterOrder treated childOrderIds as the full replacement set and detached missing children.

backend_guards.condition: expectedChildOrderIds does not exactly match current master children before write
actual removed children do not exactly match removedChildOrderIds before write

targeted_tests.summary: OpenAPI document is up to date. Scanned operations: 368.

known_unrelated_failures.summary: Existing root ZIP artifacts are reported as nested archives
release-governance passed 85/85, then artifact-clean failed on existing root ZIP artifacts
Existing unrelated failures include app trust proxy static, sales-order delete/cancel tests, and source artifact verifier
